# LotPilot for Dealers

LotPilot makes a car dealership's inventory visible and recommended inside AI
answer engines (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini, Google AI Overviews, Bing Copilot),
then works the resulting leads with AI agents that respond instantly over SMS and
voice, capture credit applications, and drive deals to appointment and sale.

The dealer's only requirement is to connect their existing inventory feed.

## What LotPilot does
- Discovery: ingests the dealer's inventory feed and makes every vehicle
  discoverable and citable by AI answer engines on the dealer's behalf.
- Conversion: AI SMS and voice agents work every lead in seconds — qualify,
  answer questions, capture credit applications, book appointments, progress deals.

## Who it's for
Franchise and independent U.S. car dealerships, dealer principals, GMs, and
internet/BDC directors who want leads directly from AI search instead of paying
marketplaces that resell the same lead to competitors.

## Key pages
- / : overview and free AI-Visibility Audit
- /how-it-works : the discovery + conversion model
- /plan : pricing and what's included
- /demo : book a demo / connect inventory feed

## Supported inventory feed formats
vAuto, HomeNet, Dealer.com, DealerSocket, and generic CSV / XML exports.

## Contact
Book a demo or connect a feed at https://dealers.lotpilot.com
